name: claudehut
description: Agentic AI workflow plugin for Java backend engineers (Spring MVC/WebFlux, JPA/R2DBC, MapStruct, Jackson, Kafka/RabbitMQ/NATS, Redis, Testcontainers). Enforces 6-phase pipeline (Brainstorm → Spec → Plan → Build → Loop → Learn) with project-aware memory & retrieval reinforcement (JIT relevance retrieval + outcome-signal usefulness prior).

loop_max_retries.title: Loop max retries
loop_max_retries.description: Maximum refactor retries inside Phase 5 Loop before escalating to user.

promotion_min_projects.title: Memory promotion threshold
promotion_min_projects.description: Minimum number of distinct projects a learning signature must appear in before being promoted to global tier.

coverage_line_threshold.title: Coverage line threshold
coverage_line_threshold.description: JaCoCo line coverage threshold. Verify gate fails below this value.

global_promotion_opt_in.title: Opt in to global memory promotion
global_promotion_opt_in.description: Allow learnings from this project to be promoted to your global ~/.claude/claudehut/ tier when threshold is met.
